introSection: Nid des Marsupilamis is a steel 4th Dimension roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Nid des Marsupilamis opened in 2019 as the second Roller Ball built by Ride Engineers Switzerland, after Wilde Hilde at Schwaben Park, and as the first Roller Ball M.

fullText:
Nid des Marsupilamis is a steel 4th Dimension roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

Nid des Marsupilamis opened in 2019 as the second Roller Ball built by Ride Engineers Switzerland, after Wilde Hilde at Schwaben Park, and as the first Roller Ball M.



Riders sit facing back-to-back.
